headline: Stantec (STN), Jacobs (J) Win Melbourne Water Infrastructure Program Contract
summary: Stantec Inc. (NYSE:STN) is one of the most promising mid-cap stocks to buy according to analysts. On May 26, Stantec, in a joint venture with Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J), announced it has been selected to deliver Greater Western Water’s five-year infrastructure planning and delivery program in Melbourne, Australia. The initiative focuses on planning and delivering critical […]
